category_sources: Official README describes it as a command-line WatchKit application launcher for the iOS Simulator.
source_facts.description says watch-sim is a command-line WatchKit application launcher.
display_name_sources: Official repository is alloy/watch-sim and README heading is watch-sim.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, usage, and options for watch-sim.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/alloy/watch-sim; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official README mentions iOS Simulator, Xcode, WatchKit application launch options, and Apple Watch display simulation.
source_facts.description identifies WatchKit and command-line launcher use.
